DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name IN (SELECT distinguished_name FROM ldap_entries WHERE email_domain = 'hotmail.com');
DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name = (SELECT distinguished_name FROM ldap_entries WHERE email = 'hellraisor@hotmail.com' AND country = 'US');

DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name = 'cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com' AND version = (SELECT MAX(version) FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name = 'cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com');

DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name = 'cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ldap_access WHERE entry_dn = 'cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com' AND access_type='delete');

WITH to_delete AS (SELECT distinguished_name FROM ldap_entries WHERE email = 'hellraisor@hotmail.com' AND country = 'US') DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name IN (SELECT distinguished_name FROM to_delete);
DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name = (SELECT dn FROM ldap_entries WHERE email = 'hellraisor@hotmail.com' LIMIT 1) AND status = 'active';
DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE exists (SELECT 1 FROM ldap_entries AS child WHERE child.parent_dn = 'cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com');
DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name NOT IN (SELECT distinguished_name FROM ldap_entries WHERE uid IS NOT NULL) AND uid NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT uid FROM ldap_users);

DELETE FROM ldap_entries WHERE distinguished_name = 'cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ldap_access WHERE entry_dn = 'cn=John Atanasov,mail=hellraisor@hotmail.com,c=US,o=hotmail.com' AND delete_permission = true);
